channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WFP Chief Cindy McCain warns that the food crisis is a business crisis: ‘Feed them now or fight them later’
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: The Fed is ‘meaningfully deviating’ from one of the most basic rules for fighting inflation, BofA warns
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: Exclusive: Roadrunner raises $27 million from Kleiner Perkins and Founders Fund
item.description: A Kleiner partner vibe-coded his way to a startup incubated inside his firm.

item.title: U.S. hotels are calling the World Cup a ‘non-event’ and 80% warn bookings are falling short of expectations, report finds
item.description: Despite FIFA selling 5 million tickets for the games, “indicators suggest the anticipated economic lift may fall short of expectations,” the American ...
